profile.name: Sakil Hossen
profile.title: Flutter Mobile Application Developer
profile.bio:
Results-driven Flutter Mobile Application Developer with hands-on experience building production-ready 
mobile applications for real-world business needs. Experienced in Flutter, Dart, GetX, Firebase, REST API 
integration, payment gateway solutions, push notifications, real-time communication systems, and AI-assisted 
development workflows. Successfully delivered multiple end-to-end applications while collaborating directly 
with clients,  
gathering requirements, and transforming business ideas into scalable mobile products.
profile.developmentPhilosophy: I place a strong emphasis on clean code architecture (like Clean Architecture or MVC/MVVM), pixel-perfect UI designs, interactive animations, and stellar app performance. Whether it is a web platform, a mobile utility, or an API integration, I strive for excellence in every project.
profile.careerGoals: To build scalable, robust mobile apps that run globally and collaborate in high-performing international teams.

projects.title: Quran International
projects.description: A multilingual Quran application designed to bring the holy book to a global audience. It features dynamic script scaling, offline audio recitations, bookmarks, translations, and robust searching, built with clean architecture.
features: Multilingual Translation Support (English, Bengali, Urdu, Spanish, etc.)
Offline Audio Recitation with verse-by-verse highlight syncing
Advanced bookmarking, indexing, and notes system
ATS-friendly clean, modern, readable typography settings

projects.title: Live Stream App
projects.description: A high-performance live video streaming application with real-time comments, live reactions, audience interactions, and payment support. Built to handle low latency stream connections.
features: Ultra-low latency live video streaming with Agora SDK integration
Real-time chat feed with floating hearts and custom emoji animations
Virtual gifting and in-app purchase token system

projects.title: Restaurant Booking System
projects.description: A premium table booking and reservation management system for restaurants. Features visual table mapping, menu pre-ordering, custom notifications, and interactive scheduling.
features: Interactive floor plan for selecting specific tables visually
Seamless reservation scheduling with calendar and push notification reminders
Pre-order meals directly from the digital menu during booking
Admin control panel for managers to manage bookings and menus

projects.title: Job Booking System
projects.description: A comprehensive marketplace app connecting service providers with clients. Features scheduling, Stripe payments, real-time tracking of providers, and in-app push alerts.
features: On-demand job scheduling with auto-matching algorithms
Integrated secure payments via Stripe and Apple/Google Pay
Real-time technician location tracking on interactive maps
Built-in rating and reviews system for quality assurance

achievements: Delivered 9+ premium production-ready mobile applications to global clients
Integrated complex payment gateways (Stripe, Google Pay, Apple Pay) in Flutter apps
Developed low-latency real-time systems using WebSockets, Agora, and Push Notifications
Collaborated with international developers and designers in remote agile environments
Managed successful production deployments to Google Play Store and Apple App Store

education.details: Focused on computer systems, database design, data structures, and core software engineering concepts.
Intensive hands-on training in cross-platform mobile architecture, state management, and real-world project deployments.

aiWorkflow.title: AI-Assisted Development
aiWorkflow.description: Utilizing advanced code generation tools to write boilerplate, speed up syntax declarations, and improve software delivery timeframes.

aiWorkflow.title: Prompt Engineering
aiWorkflow.description: Formulating detailed, contextual prompts to extract high-quality code structures, solutions to algorithms, and mock dataset configurations.

aiWorkflow.title: Rapid Prototyping
aiWorkflow.description: Spawning mock application mockups, state models, and JSON API payloads swiftly to demonstrate project feasibility in record time.

aiWorkflow.title: Requirement Analysis
aiWorkflow.description: Summarizing lengthy software specifications and user stories to map architectural diagrams and draft precise database models.

aiWorkflow.title: Development Productivity
aiWorkflow.description: Streamlining IDE setup workflows, script automation, and linter debugging to maintain optimal concentration on business logic coding.

aiWorkflow.title: AI-Powered Debugging
aiWorkflow.description: Analyzing stack traces and memory leaks with intelligent search queries to troubleshoot issues across multi-threaded operations quickly.

references.clientComment: Sakil is an exceptional Flutter developer. He delivered our cross-platform MVP two weeks ahead of schedule. The animations are incredibly smooth and the code is very easy to read. Highly recommended!
Working with Sakil Hossen was a great experience. He helped us resolve major audio sync and performance issues in our app. His understanding of WebRTC and WebSockets is outstanding.
